description: The entity considers the potential for fraud in assessing risks to the achievement of objectives.

subcriteria.name: fraud_risk_assessment
subcriteria.reference_text: Fraud risk assessment document identifying how fraud, misconduct, and unauthorized activities could occur. Assessment covers fraudulent reporting, asset misappropriation, data theft, and collusion. Assessment reviewed and updated at least annually.

subcriteria.name: anti_fraud_controls
subcriteria.reference_text: Anti-fraud controls documented including segregation of duties, dual authorization for financial transactions, access monitoring, and anomaly detection. Management override controls in place. Fraud detection tools or monitoring systems deployed.

subcriteria.name: incentives_pressures
subcriteria.reference_text: Assessment of fraud risk considers employee incentives, pressures, and opportunities. Compensation programs reviewed for fraud risk. Whistleblower mechanisms available for reporting suspected fraud.

mismatch_signals.reason: Authentication controls alone are not fraud risk assessment.
Change management is not fraud risk assessment.
